hero.title: Product 360° Video
hero.description: Create 360-degree product videos with AI to showcase every angle in motion. Use simple references to generate smooth spin-style videos that make your product feel tangible on screen.
hero.inputPlaceholder: Describe your product and the 360° video you want

steps.title: Provide your product visuals and context
steps.description: Upload a clear product image or short clip and add a brief about the product, category, and where the video will be used (storefront, PDP, ads, etc.).

steps.title: Describe the 360° motion and style
steps.description: Tell the workflow how you want the product to move and look—for example, "slow 360 spin on white" or "dynamic rotation with soft studio lighting".

steps.title: Generate AI-powered 360 product video
steps.description: The workflow uses advanced video generation to create a 360-style product video that smoothly showcases multiple sides and details in motion.

steps.title: Review, iterate, and export
steps.description: Preview the generated video, adjust prompts if needed, then export a final version ready to embed on product pages or use in paid campaigns.

items.question: What is the Product 360° Video workflow?
items.answer: Product 360° Video is an AI workflow that generates 360-style product videos for e-commerce. It helps you show your product from multiple angles in motion, using simple inputs instead of full studio shoots.

items.question: What input do I need to start?
items.answer: You typically start with a clear product image or short reference clip, plus a text description of how you want the product to rotate and the overall style of the video.

items.question: Do I still need a physical 360 turntable setup?
items.answer: No. The workflow is designed to reduce reliance on specialized hardware by using AI to simulate 360-style motion from your inputs.

items.question: Where can I use the generated 360 product videos?
items.answer: You can embed them on product detail pages, use them in paid social or display campaigns, add them to landing pages, or share them on social to better showcase your product.

items.question: Will this replace professional video shoots?
items.answer: It is best thought of as a fast, flexible alternative or complement to studio shoots—especially useful when you want to test ideas or update creatives quickly.

items.question: How does pricing work for this workflow?
items.answer: Each run consumes credits based on the underlying video generation steps, optimized around the value of getting a reusable 360-style product video without a traditional shoot.
